message:
fix(time): add Drop impls for TimerWheel and HierarchicalTimerWheel

Both timer wheel types use intrusive linked lists with raw pointers.
Without Drop impls, dropping a timer wheel without first calling clear()
would leak all registered timer entries and leave dangling pointers in
the intrusive list.

Add Drop impls that call self.clear() to properly unlink and drop all
timer entries when the wheel is dropped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
